<includeonly>Drawing {{{number}}}{{#if:{{{rev|}}}| Rev.&nbsp;{{{rev}}}}}{{#if:{{{title|}}}|, {{{title}}}}}{{#if:{{{date|}}}| ({{{date}}})}}{{#if:{{{detail|}}}|, {{{detail}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Cite drawing|number=C-301|title=Primary Clarifier Site Plan|rev=3|date=2025-11-15|detail=Detail 7}}</nowiki></code>

Renders as: Drawing C-301 Rev.&nbsp;3, Primary Clarifier Site Plan (2025-11-15), Detail 7

=== Parameters ===
* '''number''' (required): Drawing number
* '''rev''' (required): Revision number
* '''date''' (required): Revision date
* '''title''' (optional): Drawing title
* '''detail''' (optional): Specific detail, section cut, or note callout

[[Category:Citation templates]]
</noinclude>
